user.title: Set up Xiaomi Mi Smart Pedestal Fan
user.description: Enter the IP address and token of your fan. See the README for instructions on how to retrieve your token.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Please check the IP address and token.

data.retries: Number of retries on connection error
data.preset_modes_override: Preset modes override (comma-separated list, or leave empty for defaults)
